title: Create new GBP for new location
description:
Seeking help create their new GBP for their new location in Burley, Idaho that we can use when their GBP is created. I have created a separate task for the landing page to be created: Create new page for new GBP - J402 Action Garage Door

Adding verbatim from the ticket request for reference:
 
Summary: Action Garage Door is opening a new location in Burley, Idaho and needs a location landing page built to support the new GBP. The address has been confirmed via a signed lease dated May 13, 2026, with occupancy beginning June 1, 2026. This ticket covers the location page creation only — GBP setup is a separate workflow and should be initiated once the page is live.

Client Goal: Create a new location landing page for the Burley, ID location to support the new GBP and establish local search presence in that market.

Requirements for Completion:
  • New location page is created for the Burley location
  • Page includes the confirmed address: 221 West Main Street, Burley, ID 83318
  • Page content and formatting is consistent with existing Action Garage Door location pages on the site
  • Page is indexable and includes appropriate on-page SEO elements consistent with other location pages
Deadline: Occupancy begins June 1, 2026 — page should be live before or by that date so GBP setup can be initiated on time.

Priority: Regular turn around

Lease agreement attached 


Thanks much!

title: URGENT — Malicious Form Submission & Security Audit Required
assignees: Bogdan Zakharchyshyn, Den, Evgenii Gusarovskii, Jordan, Keith Bruss, Myroslav Abdeljawwad, Predrag
description:
Seeking help w/ a reported issue please. Inline w/ this chat:

https://3.basecamp.com/4226914/buckets/46283651/chats/9623329436


Adding the ticket verbatim below for reference:

Domain: goodygaragedoors.com

Primary URL: goodygaragedoors.com (site-wide security audit required)

Summary: The Goody Garage Doors website received a malicious form submission through the Commercial Garage Doors contact form containing injected spam links. Corey Vandenberg has flagged this as urgent and directed immediate PM escalation. Corey has also noted a potential pattern similar to a previously seen attack where a hidden link was buried inside a website routing data to a competitor. A full site security audit, form audit, and backlink check are required immediately.

Client Goal: Identify and eliminate any security vulnerabilities on goodygaragedoors.com, confirm no malicious code or hidden links are present, and secure all contact forms against further injection attacks.

Requirements for Completion:

Immediate Form Security:

  • All contact forms on goodygaragedoors.com are audited for vulnerabilities
  • reCAPTCHA or equivalent spam protection is confirmed active and functioning on all forms
  • Any form submission containing injected content is confirmed not stored or executed on the server

Site Security Audit:

  • Full site audit completed to check for any hidden links, buried redirects, or code that could be routing data to a competitor or external party
  • Any suspicious code, links, or scripts found are removed immediately
  • Site files and database are checked for signs of unauthorized modification

Backlink Audit:

  • Backlink profile for goodygaragedoors.com is audited for toxic, spammy, or harmful links that could indicate a negative SEO attack
  • Disavow file is updated if toxic backlinks are identified

Overhead Door Site:

  • Same security check and backlink audit performed on the Overhead Door affiliated site as requested by Sandi Lee

Final Confirmation:

  • AM notified once all checks are complete with a clear summary of findings and actions taken so the client can be updated

Deadline: Immediate — Corey has directed this be triaged and sent to developers right away.

Priority: URGENT — Active malicious form injection detected. Potential hidden competitor link on site. Developer should stop

thanks much!

title: Remove City Indicators from All GBP Listings and Location Pages
description:
Sandi Lee (VP of Marketing, Guild Garage Group) has confirmed a portfolio-wide directive to remove city indicators from all Action Garage Door GBP listings and location pages. The stated reason is to qualify for Google bulk verification in the future. The business name should be "Action Garage Door" across all locations — no city indicators. This decision has been made by the client and is not up for debate.


The following 6 live locations currently have city indicators that would need to be updated:

  • Action Garage Door of Boise
  • Action Garage Door of Caldwell
  • Action Garage Door of Eagle
  • Action Garage Door of McCall
  • Action Garage Door of Twin Falls
  • Action Garage Door of Fruitland

Meridian is already correct. Burley is a new location not yet live.


Key Questions / Clarifications Needed:

  • Does this change need to be rolled out gradually or can it be done all at once?
  • Are there any implications for existing local search rankings tied to the city-indicator versions of the business name that we should communicate to the client upfront?
  • Is there anything Clixsy needs to confirm with Google about bulk verification eligibility before making these changes?


Relevant Client Message: Sandi Lee confirmed: "I will no longer be using city indicators on GBPs so it will be 'Action Garage Door' not 'Action Garage Door of Burley' so we can later apply for bulk verification with Google."


CC:

title: Confirm if we recommended GEO to GBP Name

title: Client Request New Landing Page Creation
assignees: Chris Traynor, Emerald Green, Justyna Acosta
description:
The clients are requesting a new referral landing page for Action Garage Doors, modeled after the referral page used by Utah Garage Door. Since this is the client's first experience with this type of page, we will need to create the content from scratch. The page should clearly explain the referral program and highlight the client’s maximum reward of up to $500.


Requested Outcome
  • Create a brand-new referral landing page on the Action Garage Doors website at with this URL ->  https://actiongaragedoor.net/referral
  • The page should be fully created from scratch, since the client confirmed there is no existing content for this page.
Reference
  • Use this page as the design/content inspiration: https://utahgaragedoors.net/referral-program/
  • The client wants their page to closely resemble the Utah garage doors landing page, while reflecting Action Garage Doors’ own payout structure and messaging.

Required Page Elements
  • New referral landing page created with the slug [ /referral ]
  • QR code provided for the page
  • Messaging should reflect that users can earn up to $500
  • Include the referral payout tier information provided by the client
  • Overall page structure and presentation should closely resemble Utah Garage Doors.


Referral Payout Tiers to Include
  • $0–$99 → $5
  • $100–$499 → $10
  • $500–$999 → $25
  • $1,000–$2,499 → $50
  • $2,500–$4,999 → $100
  • $5,000–$9,999 → $150
  • $10,000–$14,999 → $250
  • $15,000+ → $500

Assets
  • Client mentioned a QR code is attached and must be included on the page

Notes for PM / Team
  • This is a net-new landing page, not an edit to an existing page
  • Requested slug is /referral
  • Creative/content direction should be based on the  Utah Garage Doors example page, but adjusted for Action Garage Doors branding and payout tiers
  • Ensure payout language reflects the client’s exact tier structure and “earn up to $500” messaging

title: Domain and SPF Record additions
description:
Seeking help with the following client requests please. 

I am adding the ticket verbatim to be sure. Please do let us know too if we have further queries or possible concerns, we can coordinate with their AM. 
 
Client has requested to add ip4:149.72.155.154 to their SPF record in DNS in Go Daddy.
Are we willing to give Microtech delegate access to their domain? If so, could you send it to helpdesk@microtechboise.com? They are their MSP and may need to add/update DNS records from time to time.

1. SPF Record Update
  • Add the following IP to the existing SPF record: ip4:149.72.155.154
  • Ensure:
    • Existing SPF entries remain intact
    • No duplication or overwrite of current SPF configuration
    • Final SPF record remains valid and properly formatted

2. Domain Access Request (GoDaddy)
  • Evaluate request to provide delegate access to Microtech (MSP)
  • If approved:
  • Grant appropriate level of access to: helpdesk@microtechboise.com
  • Ensure:
    • Access level is appropriate (not excessive)
    • Does not compromise account security

Dependencies / Approvals Required
  • Confirm:
  • Clixsy has access to the GoDaddy account
  • Approval from client (Marissa or primary contact) to:
  • Modify SPF record
  • Grant third-party domain access
 
Thanks much!

cc

title: GBPS Suspended
description:
Hey Team,

Creating a formal discussion task for this situation for proper tracking and recording, while following along here.

We just received emails from Google that their two locations, Caldwell and Eagle, have been suspended.

We should probably reach out to the client and notify them?


Other Notes:
and I have not performed any work on the GBPs or touched them at all since we were granted access two days ago.
I am unsure whether anyone else on the SEO team did, but I don't think so, as the Dev Log would have recorded any changes made to them.

Eagle GBP suspended at 2 AM 1/16 Re: GBP Changelog - DEV TEAM
Caldwell GBP suspended at 2:30 AM 1/16 Re: GBP Changelog - DEV TEAM



CC:
